version_description: No capo. Original key. Song Info and YouTube link. Analyzed chords and bass notes thoroughly. Better suited for keys and bass than version 1.
tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.version_description: This is an arrangement for a single guitar accompaniment with all the modulations back and forth from C Major up to A Major . The vocal melody along with embellishments are also shown here.

recommended.song_name: I Could Easily Fall In Love With You
When You Say Nothing At All
When The Girl In Your Arms

content:
Cliff Richard - We Don't Talk Anymore (1979)
from his album "Rock 'n' Roll Juvenile"
written by Alan Tarney

YouTube link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uRMFS_Qvi_U

4/4
112 bpm

[Intro]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]

[tab] [ch]F/C[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]F/C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
| •   •   •    •  |[/tab]

[tab] [ch]F/C[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]F/C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
| •   •   •    •  |[/tab]

[tab]          [ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
Well, it seems a long time ago[/tab]
